description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet or shelving unit with a modern, retro-inspired design. The front features three open compartments, with the middle section divided by a horizontal shelf. The sides and back are decorated with bold, curved stripes in red, orange, cream, and blue, creating a striking visual contrast against the dark main structure. The cabinet stands on small, blue feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction appears to be made of painted or laminated wood, with no visible doors or handles. The open design suggests it is intended for easy access and display of items, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, shops, or public spaces.
description: A tall, narrow cabinet with three open shelves and bold, retro-colored curved stripes on its sides and back. The structure is dark with blue feet and no visible doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open compartments and the dark main structure.
description_view_1: Side view with large, colorful curved stripes in red, orange, cream, and blue.
description_view_2: Back view with a single, large blue and cream curve on a dark background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a multi-colored, arching stripe pattern.
